title: Implement RBAC-aware navigation and authenticated shell
goal: Route users between auth screens and scanner screens, while showing role-appropriate UI.
implementation_steps: If auth state is loading, show a loading screen.
If not authenticated, redirect to login.
Add a profile screen showing name, email, and role label.
Add a logout button available to all roles.
Display admin and librarian as staff roles.
Do not add full book/user/transaction management screens in v1.
Make sure all roles can access scanner and book details.
Use mobile_features from backend to decide whether staff-only metadata can be displayed.
rbac_rules: admin can scan books and view staff metadata returned by backend.
librarian can scan books and view staff metadata returned by backend.
borrower/User can scan books and view basic book details only.
No role can access full management screens because they are out of scope for v1.
acceptance_criteria: Unauthenticated users cannot access scanner screen.
Authenticated users are routed to scanner/home.
Profile screen shows role label correctly.
